title: Explain a threshold effect
subtitle: Describe the point where quantity changes quality.
overview: Use threshold language: once, beyond a certain point, no longer, starts to.

Module: Independent Argument and Judgment. C1 Med develops sustained independent argument, sophisticated source synthesis, editorial revision, professional authority, complex social reasoning, and controlled advanced output.

sections.title: C1 Med focus
rows: Use threshold language: once, beyond a certain point, no longer, starts to.
使用临界点表达：一旦、超过某个点、不再、开始。
My position is not simply that X is true, but that it matters under these conditions.
我的立场不只是 X 是真的，而是它在这些条件下很重要。
Explain when a helpful habit becomes harmful or limiting.
解释一个有用习惯什么时候会变得有害或限制人。
Beyond a certain point, convenience stops saving time and starts shaping our expectations.
超过某个点以后，便利不再只是节省时间，而开始塑造我们的期待。

items.en: Use threshold language: once, beyond a certain point, no longer, starts to.
items.zh: 使用临界点表达：一旦、超过某个点、不再、开始。

items.en: My position is not simply that X is true, but that it matters under these conditions.
items.zh: 我的立场不只是 X 是真的，而是它在这些条件下很重要。

items.en: Beyond a certain point, convenience stops saving time and starts shaping our expectations.
items.zh: 超过某个点以后，便利不再只是节省时间，而开始塑造我们的期待。

items.en: I will make the reasoning explicit instead of relying on impressive vocabulary.
items.zh: 我会把推理说清楚，而不是依赖华丽词汇。

items.en: A C1 Med answer should sustain a line of thought across several connected moves.
items.zh: C1 Med 回答应该能通过几个相连动作维持一条思路。

items.en: If the idea becomes dense, I will slow down and give the listener a clear route.
items.zh: 如果想法变得密集，我会放慢，并给听者一条清楚路线。

items.en: I can revise for argument, evidence, rhythm, and voice.
items.zh: 我可以从论证、证据、节奏和个人声音上修改。

items.en: This lesson is finished only when I can use the move in an unfamiliar topic.
items.zh: 只有当我能在陌生话题中使用这个动作时，这节课才算完成。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Explain when a helpful habit becomes harmful or limiting.
lines.zh: 解释一个有用习惯什么时候会变得有害或限制人。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Beyond a certain point, convenience stops saving time and starts shaping our expectations.
lines.zh: 超过某个点以后，便利不再只是节省时间，而开始塑造我们的期待。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the argument more sustained and more independent?
lines.zh: 你能让这个论证更持续、更独立吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will connect the claim, evidence, limitation, and implication without losing the thread.
lines.zh: 可以。我会把观点、证据、局限和影响连起来，同时不丢主线。

items.en: Explain when a helpful habit becomes harmful or limiting.
items.zh: 解释一个有用习惯什么时候会变得有害或限制人。

items.en: Answer once in ten to twelve sentences with a sustained line of thought.
items.zh: 用十到十二个句子回答一次，保持一条持续的思路。

items.en: Add one C1 Med move: evaluate evidence, compare assumptions, refine a concept, or revise the tone.
items.zh: 加入一个 C1 Med 动作：评价证据、比较假设、细化概念或调整语气。

items.en: Record the answer, then rewrite one section for clarity and one section for style.
items.zh: 录下回答，然后为清晰度重写一部分，为风格重写一部分。

items.en: Keep the final version as a model for C1 Hi practice.
items.zh: 把最终版本保留下来，作为 C1 Hi 练习的模板。
